channel.title: Apologetics on Light in the Iron Cage
channel.description: Recent content in Apologetics on Light in the Iron Cage

item.title: Liar Fool or Messiah
item.description: Jesus said to them, “Truly, truly, I say to you, before Abraham was, I am.” – John 8:58 Have no illusions The only conclusions We’re left to draw When we have heard it all The arguments rise and fall It’s either liar, fool, or Messiah Not just the good moral teacher Some say patronizingly With who He claimed to be The choices are one of three: Liar, fool, or Messiah!
